lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬ ਚੰਦਨਿ ਕਬ ਅਕਿ ਡਾਲਿ ਕਬ ਉਚੀ ਪਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: kab chandan kab ak ddaal kab uchee pareet |
lines.english: Sometimes it is perched on the sandalwood tree, and sometimes it is on the branch of the poisonous swallow-wort. Sometimes, it soars through the heavens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਚਲਾਈਐ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਲਗੀ ਰੀਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam chalaaeeai saahib lagee reet |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, our Lord and Master leads us on, according to the Hukam of His Command; such is His Way. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਦ ਕਹਹਿ ਵਖਿਆਣ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ved kaheh vakhiaan ant na paavanaa |
lines.english: The Vedas speak and expound on the Lord, but they do not know His limits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਕਹਹਿ ਵਖਾਣ ਕਹਿ ਕਹਿ ਜਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: kete kaheh vakhaan keh keh jaavanaa |
lines.english: Some speak and expound, and while speaking and lecturing, they pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਲਖੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa purakh alakh sabad suhaavanaa |
lines.english: The True Lord is Unknowable; through the Word of His Shabad, we are embellished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿਐ ਨਾਹੀ ਭੇਦੁ ਬੁਝਿਐ ਪਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: parriai naahee bhed bujhiai paavanaa |
lines.english: Not by studying, but through understanding, is the Lord's Mystery revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟੁ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੈ ਭੇਖਿ ਕਿਸੈ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: khatt darasan kai bhekh kisai sach samaavanaa |
lines.english: There are six pathways in the Shaastras, but how rare are those who merge in the True Lord through them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਏਕੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਾ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jug jug ek man vasaavanaa |21|
lines.english: Nanak enshrines the Lord within his mind. He is the One, throughout the ages. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਨੇ ਨਾਉ ਬਿਸੰਖ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: mane naau bisankh daragah paavanaa |
lines.english: One who believes in the Name of the Infinite Lord, attains the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਲਕ ਕਉ ਆਦੇਸੁ ਢਾਢੀ ਗਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: khaalak kau aades dtaadtee gaavanaa |
lines.english: I humbly bow to the Creator Lord; I am a minstrel singing His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣ ਹਥੀ ਆਪਣੈ ਦੇ ਕੂਚਾ ਆਪੇ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapan hathee aapanai de koochaa aape laae |
lines.english: Only brand themselves with their own hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਤ੍ਰੀ ਹੋਇ ਅਠੂਹਿਆ ਨਾਗੀ ਲਗੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mantree hoe atthoohiaa naagee lagai jaae |
lines.english: Those who charm scorpions and handle snakes

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਇਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਅਤੀ ਹੂ ਧਕਾ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukam peaa dhur khasam kaa atee hoo dhakaa khaae |
lines.english: By the pre-ordained Order of our Lord and Master, they are beaten badly, and struck down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਸਿਉ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅੜੈ ਡੁਬੈ ਹਕਿ ਨਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh siau manamukh arrai ddubai hak niaae |
lines.english: If the self-willed manmukhs fight with the Gurmukh, they are condemned by the Lord, the True Judge.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਵੈ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak evai jaaneeai sabh kichh tiseh rajaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, know this well: everything is in accordance with His Will. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹਾ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਆਪੇ ਖਸਮੁ ਵੇਖੈ ਕਰਿ ਵਿਉਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: duhaa siriaa aape khasam vekhai kar viaupaae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Lord and Master of both worlds. He beholds all and makes the exact determination.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰਖੇ ਆਪ ਕਉ ਤਾ ਪਾਰਖੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak parakhe aap kau taa paarakh jaan |
lines.english: O Nanak, if someone judges himself, only then is he known as a real judge.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗੁ ਦਾਰੂ ਦੋਵੈ ਬੁਝੈ ਤਾ ਵੈਦੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: rog daaroo dovai bujhai taa vaid sujaan |
lines.english: If someone understands both the disease and the medicine, only then is he a wise physician.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਟ ਨ ਕਰਈ ਮਾਮਲਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਮਿਹਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaatt na karee maamalaa jaanai mihamaan |
lines.english: Do not involve yourself in idle business on the way; remember that you are only a guest here.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਜਾਣਿ ਗਲਾ ਕਰੇ ਹਾਣਿ ਲਾਏ ਹਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: mool jaan galaa kare haan laae haan |
lines.english: Speak with those who know the Primal Lord, and renounce your evil ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬਿ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਸੋ ਵਿਸਟੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: lab na chalee sach rahai so visatt paravaan |
lines.english: That virtuous person who does not walk in the way of greed, and who abides in Truth, is accepted and famous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰੁ ਸੰਧੇ ਆਗਾਸ ਕਉ ਕਿਉ ਪਹੁਚੈ ਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: sar sandhe aagaas kau kiau pahuchai baan |
lines.english: If an arrow is shot at the sky, how can it reach there?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਓਹੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਹੈ ਵਾਹੇਦੜੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: agai ohu agam hai vaahedarr jaan |2|
lines.english: The sky above is unreachable-know this well, O archer! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਨ ਰਹਨੀ ਵਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: karan bhagat din raat na rahanee vaareea |
lines.english: She worships Him day and night; she cannot be restrained from doing so.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: naaree purakh piaar prem seegaareea |
lines.english: The soul-bride loves her Husband Lord; she is embellished with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਹਨਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਸੇ ਵੇਚਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sach kehan aradaas se vechaareea |
lines.english: She is humble, and she offers her true and sincere prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ਮੰਝਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa manjh nivaas sabad savaareea |
lines.english: In the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, she has made her home; she is adorned with the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਨਿ ਖਸਮੈ ਪਾਸਿ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਿਧਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sohan khasamai paas hukam sidhaareea |
lines.english: She is beautiful in the Company of her Lord and Master; she walks in the Way of His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਕਹਨਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਮਨਹੁ ਪਿਆਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sakhee kehan aradaas manahu piaareea |
lines.english: With her dear friends, she offers her heart-felt prayers to her Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਵਾਸੁ ਫਿਟੁ ਸੁ ਜੀਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai dhrig vaas fitt su jeeviaa |
lines.english: Cursed is that home, and shameful is that life, which is without the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮੀਹਿ ਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿਆ ਅਗੀ ਲਹੈ ਨ ਭੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo meehi na tripatiaa agee lahai na bhukh |
lines.english: The desert is not satisfied by rain, and the fire is not quenched by desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰੀਆਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵਿਆ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: sabad savaareeaas amrit peeviaa |22|
lines.english: But she who is adorned with the Word of His Shabad, drinks in the Amrit of His Nectar. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਕੇਤੀ ਪੁਛਾ ਪੁਛ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam kee ketee puchhaa puchh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, how many times must I seek and ask for the True Name? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਰਾਜਿ ਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿਆ ਸਾਇਰ ਭਰੇ ਕਿਸੁਕ ॥
lines.translit: raajaa raaj na tripatiaa saaeir bhare kisuk |
lines.english: The king is not satisfied with his kingdom, and the oceans are full, but still they thirst for more.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਫਲੰ ਤਸਿ ਜਨਮਸਿ ਜਾਵਤੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨ ਬਿੰਦਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: nihafalan tas janamas jaavat braham na bindate |
lines.english: Life is useless, as long as one does not know the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰੰ ਸੰਸਾਰਸਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਤਰਹਿ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: saagaran sansaaras gur parasaadee tareh ke |
lines.english: Only a few cross over the world-ocean, by Guru's Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਹੈ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath hai kahu naanak beechaar |
lines.english: The Lord is the All-powerful Cause of causes, says Nanak after deep deliberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਲ ਰਖੀ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaaran karate vas hai jin kal rakhee dhaar |2|
lines.english: The creation is subject to the Creator, who sustains it by His Almighty Power. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਕਲਾਣਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਵਿਗਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa khasam kalaan kamal vigasiaa |
lines.english: Singing the Praises of their True Lord and Master, the lotuses of their hearts have blossomed forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮੈ ਕੈ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ਢਾਢੀ ਵਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: khasamai kai darabaar dtaadtee vasiaa |
lines.english: In the Court of the Lord and Master, His minstrels dwell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸਚਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਦਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa satigur sevan sachaa maarag dasiaa |
lines.english: Those who serve the Truthful True Guru are shown the True Path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਮਨ ਕਢੇ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਜਣ ਸਰਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dusaman kadte maar sajan sarasiaa |
lines.english: Their enemies have been driven out and subdued, and their friends are very pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮਹੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇ ਮਨਹੁ ਰਹਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: khasamahu pooraa paae manahu rahasiaa |
lines.english: Obtaining their Perfect Lord and Master, their minds are transfixed with ecstasy.
